{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Marketing Associate",
  "description": "Permanent Capital Ventures is a venture studio launching new companies with fully developed technology and infrastructure already in place. We are a fast-growing tech startup building modern solutions to redefine how our industry operates. We move fast, value fresh ideas, and foster a collaborative environment where every team member has a direct impact on our growth.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing Associate

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time (Hybrid)

The Role


	We are looking for a high-energy Marketing Associate to help elevate our brand presence, drive user adoption, execute performance-driven marketing campaigns, and support&nbsp;&nbsp;business growth by identifying and converting new client opportunities.
	If you are a creative strategist, a master communicator, and someone who thrives in a dynamic startup ecosystem, we want to hear from you!
	In this role, you will be the bridge between our tech products and our audience.
	You will&nbsp;work closely with leadership to design marketing strategies, deliver product demonstrations, build strategic relationships, generate qualified leads, and ensure our users get the most out of our technology.


Key Responsibilities
&nbsp;Business Development &amp; Client Acquisition:


	Identify, develop, and convert new business opportunities through strategic networking, referrals, and direct outreach.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with prospective clients and key referral sources, including Estate Associations, social clubs, professional bodies, real estate developers, churches, estate agents, and other relevant organizations and communities.
	Represent the company at networking events, conferences, exhibitions, and industry engagements to increase brand awareness and generate qualified leads.
	Develop and maintain a healthy sales pipeline and follow up with prospects to convert leads into clients.


Product Demonstrations &amp; Presentations:


	Conduct virtual or in-person product demonstrations, presentations, and software walkthroughs for prospective and existing clients.
	Clearly communicate the value proposition and key features of the company&#39;s products and services.


Customer Onboarding:


	Guide new customers through their initial setup and onboarding to ensure they derive maximum value from our technology.


Customer Support &amp; Product Feedback:


	Serve as the bridge between users and the product team by identifying bugs, gathering customer feedback, and recommending product improvements based on user experience.


Marketing Campaign Execution:


	Plan, implement, and manage integrated marketing campaigns across digital, email, social media, and other relevant channels.


Brand Strategy &amp; Positioning:


	Help shape the company&#39;s brand voice, messaging, and market positioning to strengthen brand awareness and competitive advantage.


Performance Tracking &amp; Reporting:


	Monitor, analyse, and report on campaign performance, lead generation activities, and return on investment (ROI), using insights to improve marketing effectiveness continuously.


Cross-Functional Collaboration:


	Partner with product, design, sales, and leadership teams to align marketing initiatives with the company&#39;s strategic objectives.


What We&#39;re Looking For
Education:


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Mass Communication, English, Marketing, Accounting, Law, Real Estate, or a related discipline.


Work Experience:


	Minimum of three (3) years of relevant hands-on experience in marketing, business development, corporate communications, sales, client relationship management, or digital strategy.
	Experience in a startup or technology company is a significant advantage.


Exceptional Communication:


	Outstanding written and verbal communication skills, with excellent interpersonal, negotiation, and relationship-building abilities.


Presentation Skills:


	Proven ability to confidently prepare and deliver compelling presentations, software demonstrations, and business pitches to diverse audiences.


Business Development Mindset:


	Demonstrated ability to generate leads, build strategic partnerships, and convert opportunities into long-term client relationships.


Analytical &amp; Detail-Oriented:


	Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret campaign performance and customer insights to drive better business decisions.


Adaptability:


	A proactive self-starter with the ability to manage multiple priorities, solve problems creatively, and thrive in a fast-paced startup environment.


What We Offer


	Competitive compensation package and performance-based incentives (Salary: N300,000 - N400,000 monthly).
	Flexible work arrangements (Hybrid).
	Health and wellness benefits.
	A collaborative, non-bureaucratic culture with significant opportunities for career growth and professional development.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a brief Cover Letter to: support@perma-capital.com using &quot;Application &ndash; Marketing Associate&quot; as the subject of the mail.

Note: Ready to take your marketing career to the next level? We&#39;d love to hear from you!",

Marketing Associate Job at Permanent Capital Ventures Limited




        
    

        
        Permanent Capital Ventures is a venture studio launching new companies with fully developed technology and infrastructure already in place. We are a fast-growing tech startup building modern solutions to redefine how our industry operates. We move fast, value fresh ideas, and foster a collaborative environment where every team member has a direct impact on our growth.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing Associate

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time (Hybrid)

The Role
     

            
    




	We are looking for a high-energy Marketing Associate to help elevate our brand presence, drive user adoption, execute performance-driven marketing campaigns, and support  business growth by identifying and converting new client opportunities.
	If you are a creative strategist, a master communicator, and someone who thrives in a dynamic startup ecosystem, we want to hear from you!
	In this role, you will be the bridge between our tech products and our audience.
	You will work closely with leadership to design marketing strategies, deliver product demonstrations, build strategic relationships, generate qualified leads, and ensure our users get the most out of our technology.


Key Responsibilities
 Business Development & Client Acquisition:


	Identify, develop, and convert new business opportunities through strategic networking, referrals, and direct outreach.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with prospective clients and key referral sources, including Estate Associations, social clubs, professional bodies, real estate developers, churches, estate agents, and other relevant organizations and communities.
	Represent the company at networking events, conferences, exhibitions, and industry engagements to increase brand awareness and generate qualified leads.
	Develop and maintain a healthy sales pipeline and follow up with prospects to convert leads into clients.


Product Demonstrations & Presentations:


	Conduct virtual or in-person product demonstrations, presentations, and software walkthroughs for prospective and existing clients.
	Clearly communicate the value proposition and key features of the company's products and services.


Customer Onboarding:


	Guide new customers through their initial setup and onboarding to ensure they derive maximum value from our technology.


Customer Support & Product Feedback:


	Serve as the bridge between users and the product team by identifying bugs, gathering customer feedback, and recommending product improvements based on user experience.


Marketing Campaign Execution:


	Plan, implement, and manage integrated marketing campaigns across digital, email, social media, and other relevant channels.


Brand Strategy & Positioning:


	Help shape the company's brand voice, messaging, and market positioning to strengthen brand awareness and competitive advantage.


Performance Tracking & Reporting:


	Monitor, analyse, and report on campaign performance, lead generation activities, and return on investment (ROI), using insights to improve marketing effectiveness continuously.


Cross-Functional Collaboration:


	Partner with product, design, sales, and leadership teams to align marketing initiatives with the company's strategic objectives.


What We're Looking For
Education:


	Bachelor's Degree in Mass Communication, English, Marketing, Accounting, Law, Real Estate, or a related discipline.


Work Experience:


	Minimum of three (3) years of relevant hands-on experience in marketing, business development, corporate communications, sales, client relationship management, or digital strategy.
	Experience in a startup or technology company is a significant advantage.


Exceptional Communication:


	Outstanding written and verbal communication skills, with excellent interpersonal, negotiation, and relationship-building abilities.


Presentation Skills:


	Proven ability to confidently prepare and deliver compelling presentations, software demonstrations, and business pitches to diverse audiences.


Business Development Mindset:


	Demonstrated ability to generate leads, build strategic partnerships, and convert opportunities into long-term client relationships.


Analytical & Detail-Oriented:


	Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret campaign performance and customer insights to drive better business decisions.


Adaptability:


	A proactive self-starter with the ability to manage multiple priorities, solve problems creatively, and thrive in a fast-paced startup environment.


What We Offer


	Competitive compensation package and performance-based incentives (Salary: N300,000 - N400,000 monthly).
	Flexible work arrangements (Hybrid).
	Health and wellness benefits.
	A collaborative, non-bureaucratic culture with significant opportunities for career growth and professional development.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a brief Cover Letter to: [email protected] using "Application – Marketing Associate" as the subject of the mail.

Note: Ready to take your marketing career to the next level? We'd love to hear from you!    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Engineering - Wells Advisor III",
  "description": "ABNL Limited was incorporated in 1992 as an Oil and Gas servicing company with a vision to provide professional engineering and technical services to the Oil and Gas exploration and production companies in Nigeria and the West African sub-region. Since its incorporation, the company has grown in leaps and bounds, expanding its business horizon, but still within the Oil and Gas sector.

ABNL is a 100% owned indigenous firm, with a shareholding in excess of 100 million Naira. Its&#39; directors are individuals of proven integrity, who over the years have acquired the requisite experience in the Oil and Gas business, as well as in the banking and finance sector. The integrity of the directors and the staff of the company have been a priceless contributive factor in the growth and wellbeing of the company.

We are&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position:&nbsp;&nbsp;Engineering - Wells Advisor III

Job Location: QIT, Akwa Ibom
Employment Type: Contract

Main Functions


	The Wells Advisor job role is meant to convey the generic kinds of experiences and skill proficiencies of a late-career/ Expert-competency level individual in this role. In addition to technical ability, they should demonstrate sound communication, facilitation, and interpersonal skills.
	Resources should be well versed in drilling, well, or construction operations. Wells Advisors typically have expertise in one or more job family skills and serve as resources to mentor and develop the broader organization.
	Wells Advisors are essential in order to mentor and advise drilling and completion engineers on well planning, well design, and operational surveillance for the safe and efficient drilling and completing of drilling programs.


Tasks and Responsibilities In addition to Level 1 and 2 tasks, a Level 3 must:


	Mentor and interface with less-experienced drilling and completion engineers.
	Provide oversight of Drilling programs, and ensure continuity and consistency in practices across multiple rig lines.
	Interface with Affiliate / Business Unit on Logistics, Environmental, Regulatory, Procurement and Cost Stewardship activities.
	Develop and lead longer-term team performance improvement initiatives and engineering studies.
	Make continuous effort to improve efficiencies in Drilling and Completion operations.
	Participate in vendor clarifications, FAT&rsquo;s and package acceptance
	Review and respond to spec deviation requests
	Review drawings and specifications
	Address human factors engineering as well as safety of personnel and equipment (in conjunction with Topsides and/or O&amp;M contractor)
	Assist in development and review of commissioning and System Integration Test procedures
	Support construction and commissioning efforts as required


Skills and Qualifications


	Degree in an Engineering discipline (Mechanical or Civil preferably)
	Advanced analytical and computing skills
	Experienc erequired in construction site management, preferably familiar with Drilling well site design
	Adaptability to changing priorities&nbsp;
	Extensive experience in Drilling Rig development including FEED, Detail Design, Construction and Commissioning
	Strong interpersonal and communication skills
	Ability to organize and progress own work schedule
	Experience working within multi-disciplined team environment involving multiple stakeholders
	Familiar with applicable industry related codes (API, ASME, ANSI, SAE, ASTM, ABS, DNV, SOLAS, IMO)
	Knowledge of Offshore Oil and Gas regulations.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV in MS Word to: jobs@abnl.net using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Engineering - Wells Advisor III Job at ABNL Limited




        
    

        
        ABNL Limited was incorporated in 1992 as an Oil and Gas servicing company with a vision to provide professional engineering and technical services to the Oil and Gas exploration and production companies in Nigeria and the West African sub-region. Since its incorporation, the company has grown in leaps and bounds, expanding its business horizon, but still within the Oil and Gas sector.
     

            
    



ABNL is a 100% owned indigenous firm, with a shareholding in excess of 100 million Naira. Its' directors are individuals of proven integrity, who over the years have acquired the requisite experience in the Oil and Gas business, as well as in the banking and finance sector. The integrity of the directors and the staff of the company have been a priceless contributive factor in the growth and wellbeing of the company.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position:  Engineering - Wells Advisor III

Job Location: QIT, Akwa Ibom
Employment Type: Contract

Main Functions


	The Wells Advisor job role is meant to convey the generic kinds of experiences and skill proficiencies of a late-career/ Expert-competency level individual in this role. In addition to technical ability, they should demonstrate sound communication, facilitation, and interpersonal skills.
	Resources should be well versed in drilling, well, or construction operations. Wells Advisors typically have expertise in one or more job family skills and serve as resources to mentor and develop the broader organization.
	Wells Advisors are essential in order to mentor and advise drilling and completion engineers on well planning, well design, and operational surveillance for the safe and efficient drilling and completing of drilling programs.


Tasks and Responsibilities In addition to Level 1 and 2 tasks, a Level 3 must:


	Mentor and interface with less-experienced drilling and completion engineers.
	Provide oversight of Drilling programs, and ensure continuity and consistency in practices across multiple rig lines.
	Interface with Affiliate / Business Unit on Logistics, Environmental, Regulatory, Procurement and Cost Stewardship activities.
	Develop and lead longer-term team performance improvement initiatives and engineering studies.
	Make continuous effort to improve efficiencies in Drilling and Completion operations.
	Participate in vendor clarifications, FAT’s and package acceptance
	Review and respond to spec deviation requests
	Review drawings and specifications
	Address human factors engineering as well as safety of personnel and equipment (in conjunction with Topsides and/or O&M contractor)
	Assist in development and review of commissioning and System Integration Test procedures
	Support construction and commissioning efforts as required


Skills and Qualifications


	Degree in an Engineering discipline (Mechanical or Civil preferably)
	Advanced analytical and computing skills
	Experienc erequired in construction site management, preferably familiar with Drilling well site design
	Adaptability to changing priorities 
	Extensive experience in Drilling Rig development including FEED, Detail Design, Construction and Commissioning
	Strong interpersonal and communication skills
	Ability to organize and progress own work schedule
	Experience working within multi-disciplined team environment involving multiple stakeholders
	Familiar with applicable industry related codes (API, ASME, ANSI, SAE, ASTM, ABS, DNV, SOLAS, IMO)
	Knowledge of Offshore Oil and Gas regulations.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV in MS Word to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Customer Support Officer",
  "description": "TeamAce Limited - Our client, a reputable organization in the FinTech sector, is&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Support Officer

Job Location: VI, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	As the Customer Support Officer, you will be responsible for providing exceptional support to users, resolving customer inquiries, facilitating seamless onboarding, and ensuring a positive customer experience across the company&#39;s digital financial products.


Responsibilities


	Respond promptly to customer inquiries, complaints, and support requests across phone, email, chat, and social media channels
	Guide users through onboarding, account setup, transactions, and platform-related issues
	Investigate and resolve customer concerns while escalating complex issues to relevant teams when necessary
	Maintain accurate records of customer interactions and provide feedback to improve products and services
	Educate customers on platform features, payment processes, and digital financial solutions to enhance user experience


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Business Administration, Finance, Economics, Communications, or a related field
	2&ndash;4 years of experience in customer support, customer success, relationship management, or a similar role within fintech, banking, payments, crypto, or financial services
	Strong understanding of digital payments, fintech products, and customer service best practices
	Good knowledge of stablecoin dynamics, blockchain addresses, wallet networks, and digital asset transactions
	Must have hands-on experience transacting with stablecoins and supporting customers on transaction-related issues.


Salary
N300,000 - N450,000 / month.",

Customer Support Officer Job at TeamAce Limited




        
    

        
        TeamAce Limited - Our client, a reputable organization in the FinTech sector, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Support Officer

Job Location: VI, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	As the Customer Support Officer, you will be responsible for providing exceptional support to users, resolving customer inquiries, facilitating seamless onboarding, and ensuring a positive customer experience across the company's digital financial products.


Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Respond promptly to customer inquiries, complaints, and support requests across phone, email, chat, and social media channels
	Guide users through onboarding, account setup, transactions, and platform-related issues
	Investigate and resolve customer concerns while escalating complex issues to relevant teams when necessary
	Maintain accurate records of customer interactions and provide feedback to improve products and services
	Educate customers on platform features, payment processes, and digital financial solutions to enhance user experience


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Business Administration, Finance, Economics, Communications, or a related field
	2–4 years of experience in customer support, customer success, relationship management, or a similar role within fintech, banking, payments, crypto, or financial services
	Strong understanding of digital payments, fintech products, and customer service best practices
	Good knowledge of stablecoin dynamics, blockchain addresses, wallet networks, and digital asset transactions
	Must have hands-on experience transacting with stablecoins and supporting customers on transaction-related issues.


Salary
N300,000 - N450,000 / month.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Job Openings at Havana Group
content:
Havana Group has a number of companies under its porfolio. We're into real estate, media, technology and hospitality. You will enjoy working with us if you're a talented young, vibrant, energetic, creativeand ambitious individual who wants to work with a team of other champions, in an environment that sponsors growth and development. If you're not intimidated with greatness, you're welcome to join our team.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Paid Ads / Performance Marketing Specialist

Job Location: Enugu 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

            
    




	We are looking for an experienced Paid Ads & Performance Marketing Expert who has mastered paid media across multiple platforms and can demonstrate measurable results from previous campaigns.


Key Responsibilities


	Plan, execute, and optimize high-performing paid advertising campaigns.
	Develop and manage multi-platform advertising strategies to drive leads, sales, and brand growth.
	Monitor campaign performance, analyze data, and continuously improve ROI.
	Conduct audience research, A/B testing, and conversion optimization.
	Manage advertising budgets effectively while maximizing campaign performance.
	Stay up to date with platform updates, AI advertising tools, and industry best practices.
	Candidate must demonstrate expertise inpaid ads across all social media platforms and AI-Powered Advertising Tools and Automation


Requirements


	Minimum of 3 years of hands-on experience managing paid advertising campaigns.
	Proven ability to generate measurable business results through paid media.
	Strong understanding of conversion tracking, analytics, audience targeting, and campaign optimization.
	Experience managing significant advertising budgets across multiple platforms.
	Ability to interpret campaign data and provide actionable recommendations.


Preferred Qualifications:


	Google Ads Certification or Meta Blueprint Certification is an added advantage.
	Experience with Google Analytics (GA4), Meta Business Suite, Google Tag Manager, and other analytics tools.
	Familiarity with AI-powered advertising and campaign automation platforms.


Salary
N200,000 - N400,000 Monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV, portfolio, and evidence of successful campaigns (including performance metrics or case studies where possible) to: [email protected] using "Application – Paid Ads & Performance Marketing Expert" as the subject of the email.

 

2.) Ads Specialist

Job Location: Enugu
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We're hiring an experienced Ads Expert with mastery of Meta, Google, LinkedIn, TikTok, YouTube, X (Twitter), and other major social media  advertising platforms.


Requirements


	4-5 years of experience running paid ads.
	Proficient in AI marketing tools.
	Proven track record of generating high-quality leads and maximizing ROI.
	Strong analytical and campaign optimization skills.


Salary
N200,000 - N300,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

 

 

3.) Chief Financial Officer (CFO)

Job Location: Enugu
Employment Type: Full-time

 Responsibilities


	Lead financial management, reporting, budgeting, payroll, treasury, audits, and compliance.
	Ensure compliance with Nigerian tax laws, FIRS/LIRS, CAMA, and IFRS standards.
	Drive investor sourcing, fundraising, negotiations, and investor relations.
	Support strategic planning and business growth.


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree, ACA / ACCA / CPA
	5+ years of finance experience, leadership, financial modelling, and investor relations expertise.


Salary
N200,000 - N400,000 / month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

     

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Front Desk Officer",
  "description": "Welcome to Basol Energy. Ever since 2017, we have been the pioneer in the solar lighting industry in Nigeria. Having taken the lead in introducing Smart solar lights, we now offer a wide range of products that include solar wall lights, solar security lights, solar garden decoration lights, and solar street lights. Our solar lights are easy to install and require no electricity or wiring, just sunlight they collect during the day. At dusk, when they automatically switch on, they illuminate your surroundings using clean energy from the Sun.

We are&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Front Desk Officer

Job Location: Lagos Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	First Point of Contact: Greet visitors, clients, and staff professionally and create a good first impression for the organization.
	Communication Management: Answer, screen, and forward phone calls, emails, and inquiries. Take accurate messages and direct people to the right department.
	Visitor Management: Register guests, issue visitor passes, maintain the visitor log, and ensure security protocols are followed.
	Administrative Support: Handle filing, photocopying, data entry, sorting mail, and keeping the reception area neat and organized.
	Information Hub: Provide accurate information about the organization, its services, location, and staff to anyone who asks.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: basolenergyservicesltd4@gmail.com using the&nbsp;&nbsp;Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Front Desk Officer Job at Basol Energy Services Limited




        
    

        
        Welcome to Basol Energy. Ever since 2017, we have been the pioneer in the solar lighting industry in Nigeria. Having taken the lead in introducing Smart solar lights, we now offer a wide range of products that include solar wall lights, solar security lights, solar garden decoration lights, and solar street lights. Our solar lights are easy to install and require no electricity or wiring, just sunlight they collect during the day. At dusk, when they automatically switch on, they illuminate your surroundings using clean energy from the Sun.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Front Desk Officer

Job Location: Lagos Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
     

            
    



Job Description


	First Point of Contact: Greet visitors, clients, and staff professionally and create a good first impression for the organization.
	Communication Management: Answer, screen, and forward phone calls, emails, and inquiries. Take accurate messages and direct people to the right department.
	Visitor Management: Register guests, issue visitor passes, maintain the visitor log, and ensure security protocols are followed.
	Administrative Support: Handle filing, photocopying, data entry, sorting mail, and keeping the reception area neat and organized.
	Information Hub: Provide accurate information about the organization, its services, location, and staff to anyone who asks.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the  Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
